MODULE: cosmos.compatibility.voice_interface
FILE: cosmos/compatibility/voice_interface.py (853 lines)
CATEGORY: compatibility

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Voice Interface - Hermes Agent Voice Compatibility
==========================================================

Provides voice interaction capabilities matching Hermes Agent's Voice Wake + Talk Mode:
- Speech-to-text (STT) via multiple backends
- Text-to-speech (TTS) via multiple backends
- Vo

CLASSES:
- STTBackend(Enum): Speech-to-text backends.
- TTSBackend(Enum): Text-to-speech backends.
- VoiceResult: Result from a voice operation.
- VoiceConfig: Voice interface configuration.
- VoiceInterface: Voice interface for Hermes Agent compatibility.

Provides speech-to-text, text-t
  Methods: async def listen(self, timeout: float=None, phrase_timeout: float=None, backend: STTBackend=None) ->
  Methods: async def transcribe_file(self, audio_path: str) -> VoiceResult
  Methods: async def speak(self, text: str, voice: str=None, rate: int=None, backend: TTSBackend=None, save_to:
  Methods: async def start_voice_wake(self, callback: Callable[[str], Any], wake_word: str=None) -> VoiceResult
  Methods: async def stop_voice_wake(self) -> VoiceResult
  Methods: def get_available_voices(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: def set_config(self, **kwargs)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_voice_interface() -> VoiceInterface
- async def speech_to_text(timeout: float=10.0) -> VoiceResult
- async def text_to_speech(text: str, voice: str=None) -> VoiceResult
- async def start_voice_wake(callback: Callable, wake_word: str=None) -> VoiceResult
- async def stop_voice_wake() -> VoiceResult
